messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: Frank, thanks for making time. How's the team finding the platform?

messages.speaker: Frank Wilson
messages.text: Honestly, adoption has been slower than we expected. Only about a third of our team uses it regularly.

messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: That's concerning. What's driving the low adoption?

messages.speaker: Frank Wilson
messages.text: The new dashboard features aren't intuitive. We've had to do a lot of internal training.

messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: We can definitely help with that. Would product training sessions help?

messages.speaker: Frank Wilson
messages.text: Maybe, but I'll be honest — we've started looking at RivalCo. Their UX is more straightforward.

messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: I appreciate the candour. Let me put together an ROI analysis and schedule training.

messages.speaker: Frank Wilson
messages.text: Sure, but pricing is also a factor. We're not seeing the ROI we expected for what we're paying.
